info.title: Ontology Platform MVP6.7 Impact Simulation Planning API
info.description: Planning-only OpenAPI artifact for MVP6.7 Impact Simulation: a READ-ONLY impact report for an existing governance change request, fixed durably by ADR 0014 and frozen by docs/pm/MVP6_7_IMPACT_SIMULATION_BRIEF.md. Given a change-request id (any lifecycle state), a human runs an impact simulation and reads a report covering five deterministic dimensions: (1) affected ontology elements = direct target(s) of each change item + bounded transitive dependents (max depth 2); (2) dependent candidate entities/relations = exact count + capped OntologyElementRef list + truncated flag; (3) dependent published elements = exact count + capped ref list + truncated; (4) affected MVP3 ValidationRuleCode(s) + MVP4 QualityMetricGroup(s) by reference; (5) severity/summary rollup (per-item ImpactSeverity + report-level max + per-severity counts). ImpactSeverity = NONE/LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/BREAKING computed by a deterministic rule from the counted dimensions (no LLM, no randomness). This is the RETURN TO READ-ONLY after the single MVP6.6 apply mutation: it mutates NOTHING (not the ontology draft/published, candidates, prompts, extraction, evaluation, or governance state; it never flips status/application_state and never SUPERSEDES). Every response carries an all-false ImpactSimulationMutationGuard (distinct from the MVP6.6 GovernanceApplicationMutationGuard; MVP6.7 turns NO flag true, ever). ADVISORY-ONLY: never blocks/gates/pre-authorizes/auto-triggers apply or publish; severity is informational. Read authorization = any project member who can view the change request (MVP5 Role, no elevated role); unauthorized -> 403 PERMISSION_DENIED; missing request -> 404 CHANGE_REQUEST_NOT_FOUND. Additive/disjoint to MVP1-MVP6.6: reuses MVP6.5/6.6 governance change-request/item/OntologyElementRef/ChangeRequestChangeType/ChangeRequestTargetKind, MVP1 OntologyElementStatus/OntologyVersionStatus, MVP3 ValidationRuleCode/ValidationResultSeverity, MVP4 QualityMetricGroup, and MVP5 Role by reference (no renames). Wave45 contract-first planning only: no runtime code, models, migrations, or tests.

tags.name: MVP6.7 Impact Simulation
tags.description: Read-only, advisory, deterministic-bounded impact analysis of a governance change request. No mutation.

get.summary: Run/read the read-only impact simulation for a change request
get.description: Computes and returns the deterministic, read-only impact report for the given governance change request. Idempotent GET: mutates NOTHING (all-false ImpactSimulationMutationGuard on every response). The analysis is bounded (transitive dependent depth <= 2; per-dimension ref list capped with an exact count + truncated flag) and byte-stable for a fixed change request + graph snapshot. Advisory-only: it never applies, publishes, enforces, gates, re-validates, re-extracts, flips status/application_state, or sets SUPERSEDED. Read authz = any project member who can view the change request (no elevated role). Optional target_ontology_version_id query pins the ontology version snapshot the analysis reads against (else the change request's own ontology_version_id / project current DRAFT).

200.description: The read-only impact report (all-false mutation guard).

ChangeRequestId.name: change_request_id
ChangeRequestId.description: Id of the existing MVP6.5/6.6 governance change request to analyze. Reused by reference; not mutated.

TargetOntologyVersionIdQuery.name: target_ontology_version_id
TargetOntologyVersionIdQuery.description: Optional explicit ontology version to read the analysis against (read-only snapshot pin). Omit to use the change request's own ontology_version_id (or the project current DRAFT). Never mutated.

RefCap.name: ref_cap
RefCap.description: Optional override for the per-dimension returned-refs cap (dependent candidate refs, dependent published refs, affected-element dependent refs). Default 20, max 200. The dimension count is ALWAYS exact regardless of the cap; only the returned ref list is capped, with truncated=true when the cap is hit.

PermissionDenied.description: 403 PERMISSION_DENIED - actor cannot view this change request. Mutates nothing.

ChangeRequestChangeType.description: Reused VERBATIM from MVP6.5/6.6, NOT renamed. Drives per-item severity: ADD of a new element with no dependents -> NONE; DEPRECATE/MODIFY on an element with dependents escalates.

ChangeRequestTargetKind.description: Reused VERBATIM from MVP6.5/6.6, NOT renamed. The ontology element kind a change item targets.

OntologyElementStatus.description: Reused VERBATIM from MVP1 (apps/backend/app/core/enums.py), NOT renamed. Status of a referenced ontology element at the read moment.

OntologyVersionStatus.description: Reused VERBATIM from MVP1, NOT renamed. Status of the ontology version the analysis reads against.

ValidationRuleCode.description: Reused VERBATIM from MVP3 (openapi-mvp3-draft.json), NOT renamed. Affected validation rule codes are reported BY REFERENCE (advisory); MVP6.7 runs no validation job.

ValidationResultSeverity.description: Reused VERBATIM from MVP3, NOT renamed. Drives severity: an affected FAILED validation -> HIGH; an affected WARNING validation -> MEDIUM. INFO does not escalate.

QualityMetricGroup.description: Reused VERBATIM from MVP4 (openapi-mvp4-draft.json), NOT renamed. Affected quality metric groups whose scope intersects an affected element are reported BY REFERENCE (advisory); MVP6.7 recomputes no quality metric.

Role.description: Reused VERBATIM from apps/backend/app/core/enums.py, NOT renamed. Impact simulation is read-only: ANY project member who can view the change request may read the report (no elevated role, unlike the MVP6.6 apply).

OntologyElementRef.description: Reused BY REFERENCE from MVP6.5/6.6 (same shape, not renamed). A reference to a single ontology element. Exactly one of the id fields is set, matching target_kind. status is the element's OntologyElementStatus at the read moment.

ImpactSeverity.description: NEW (MVP6.7). Deterministic per-item / report-rollup impact severity, computed from the counted dimensions (no LLM, no randomness). Order low->high: NONE < LOW < MEDIUM < HIGH < BREAKING. Rules (highest matching wins): BREAKING = DEPRECATE/MODIFY on an element with dependent PUBLISHED elements (or that would violate a published-graph reference); HIGH = DEPRECATE/MODIFY on an element with dependent CANDIDATE elements, or an affected FAILED-severity validation; MEDIUM = transitive ontology dependents affected, or affected WARNING-severity validations / affected quality groups; LOW = only the direct element affected, no dependents; NONE = ADD of a new element with no existing dependents. Advisory only; never gates apply/publish.

ImpactSeverityReason.description: NEW (MVP6.7). Deterministic machine reason code explaining which rule set an item's ImpactSeverity. Display/audit aid; the enum is the authority.

ImpactSimulationMutationGuard.description: NEW (MVP6.7). ALL FLAGS FALSE on EVERY response, no exceptions. Distinct from the MVP6.6 GovernanceApplicationMutationGuard (which turns ontology_draft_mutated true on a successful apply): impact simulation turns NO flag true, ever. QA asserts zero sanctioned mutation surface: any true flag - or any data-level change to ontology/published/candidate/prompt/governance state after running a simulation - is a defect.

AffectedOntologyElement.description: NEW (MVP6.7). An ontology element affected by a change item: either the DIRECT target of the item or a bounded transitive DEPENDENT (max depth 2 = direct + one hop). relation_to_target names how it depends on the item's direct target; depth 0 = the direct target itself.

depth.description: 0 = direct target of the change item; 1 = first-hop dependent; 2 = second-hop dependent (cap).

display_name.description: Human label of the element (advisory display aid).

DependencyRelation.description: NEW (MVP6.7). How a transitive dependent relates to the change item's direct target within the ontology definition. DIRECT_TARGET = the element the change item points at (depth 0).

DependentRefBucket.description: NEW (MVP6.7). A bounded dependent-reference dimension: an EXACT count (never capped) plus a capped ref list with truncated=true when the ref_cap is hit. Used for dependent candidate entities/relations and dependent published elements.

count.description: EXACT total number of dependents. Always accurate regardless of the ref cap.

refs.description: Capped list of dependent refs (at most ref_cap items). OntologyElementRef-style references to the depended-on ontology element (candidate rows / published elements are grouped by the affected ontology element they reference).

truncated.description: true when count > len(refs) because the ref_cap was hit.

AffectedValidationRef.description: NEW (MVP6.7). An affected MVP3 validation reported BY REFERENCE (advisory). rule_code + the max ValidationResultSeverity whose scope intersects an affected element. No validation job is run.

ImpactItem.description: NEW (MVP6.7). The impact analysis for a single change item of the change request. Bounded + deterministic. Carries the five dimensions scoped to this item plus the item-level ImpactSeverity.

affected_ontology_elements.description: Dimension 1: direct target (depth 0) + bounded transitive dependents (depth 1-2).

affected_validations.description: Dimension 4a: affected MVP3 ValidationRuleCode(s) by reference.

affected_quality_groups.description: Dimension 4b: affected MVP4 QualityMetricGroup(s) by reference.

ImpactSeverityCounts.description: NEW (MVP6.7). Per-severity item counts for the report rollup. Sum == number of change items.

ImpactSummary.description: NEW (MVP6.7). Dimension 5: the deterministic report-level rollup. max_severity = the highest ImpactSeverity across all items (NONE if there are no items). severity_counts = per-severity item counts. Aggregate totals are EXACT (summed from exact per-item counts) even when per-item ref lists are truncated.

total_affected_ontology_elements.description: EXACT count of distinct affected ontology elements across all items.

total_dependent_candidates.description: EXACT total dependent candidate rows across all items.

total_dependent_published.description: EXACT total dependent published elements across all items.

affected_validation_rule_codes.description: Distinct union of affected ValidationRuleCode(s) across all items (by reference).

affected_quality_groups.description: Distinct union of affected QualityMetricGroup(s) across all items (by reference).

ImpactSimulationCapabilities.description: NEW (MVP6.7). Display-only capability hint. can_view is true for any project member who can view the change request. can_apply is echoed advisory context (governed by the SEPARATE MVP6.6 apply path) so the FE can decide whether to surface the apply CTA next to the read-only report; MVP6.7 never grants or gates apply.

can_apply.description: Advisory echo of MVP6.6 apply capability; MVP6.7 does not authorize apply.

actor_role.description: Advisory echo of the requesting actor's MVP5 Role (read authz uses standard project-read membership; no elevated role required for MVP6.7).

ImpactSimulationReport.description: NEW (MVP6.7). The read-only impact report for a change request. Deterministic + byte-stable for a fixed change request + graph snapshot. Carries per-item impact, the rollup summary, the bounding parameters actually applied, an ImpactSimulationCapabilities hint, and the all-false ImpactSimulationMutationGuard. impact_report_id is present ONLY if the backend persists reports (MVP6.3 pattern, deferred to Wave46); either way the report is read-only.

impact_report_id.description: Present only if reports are persisted (MVP6.3-style keyed record). Null / omitted when computed on demand. Read-only either way.

change_request_status.description: Advisory echo of the change request's current lifecycle status (e.g. APPROVED); read-only, never mutated by this call.

analyzed_ontology_version_id.description: The ontology version the analysis read against (read-only snapshot pin).

computed_at.description: When the report was computed (advisory; does not affect determinism of the analysis payload).

ImpactBounding.description: NEW (MVP6.7). The deterministic bounding parameters actually applied to this report. Echoed so the FE can render honest truncation affordances and QA can assert the caps.

max_dependent_depth.description: P0 fixed at 2 (direct target + one hop).

any_dimension_truncated.description: true if any DependentRefBucket in the report has truncated=true.

ApiError.description: Standard error. codes: PROJECT_NOT_FOUND (404), CHANGE_REQUEST_NOT_FOUND (404), ONTOLOGY_VERSION_NOT_FOUND (404), PERMISSION_DENIED (403). Impact simulation is read-only: every error body mutates nothing.
